| **Interview 28 · Close Friend** | **Interview 29 · Professional Colleague** |

| | |
| Tell me about when Nilu was finding her voice | What makes Nilu's approach unique? |
| What changed when she stopped hiding? | Describe her impact on the people she interviews |
| Share a moment when you saw her step into her calling | How does she create space for others' stories? |
| | |
| *Seated · Relaxed setting · Natural light · Look at interviewer not camera* | *Seated · Relaxed setting · Natural light · Look at interviewer not camera* |

## SECTION D — HOW TO SUBMIT

| **HOW TO SUBMIT** |
|---|
| Upload via Google Drive or Dropbox · Set to: Anyone with the link can view |
| Subject line: NILU NADERI — B-Roll Submission |
| Folder structure: 01_Childhood · 02_Career · 03_Family · 04_Current Lifestyle · 05_Interviews · 06_Archival Photos |
| Label every file clearly (e.g. office_walk_morning.mp4 / childhood_birthday_1995.jpg) |

# DETAILED CONTEXT & VIDEOGRAPHER NOTES

*Share this page with your videographer. This page explains why each shot matters.*

---

## SECTION: PHOTO CONTEXT — WHY WE NEED THESE

| **#** | **Photo** | **Episode quote** | **Why we need it** |
|---|---|---|---|
| **CHILDHOOD** | | | |
| 1 | Childhood photo | "I got to the states when I was in third grade" | Shows the young girl who learned to survive by fitting in. |
| 2 | Hometown photo | "I was born in Iran 1982, a couple years after the revolution" | Establishes the world you fled from. |
| **CAREER** | | | |
| 3 | Radio station photo | "sitting behind the mixer as like a 13-year-old girl, I, I just felt something really, um, innate" | The seed of storytelling planted early. |
| 4 | UC Irvine photo | "I ended up, after, after the show, after one year of doing that show, uh, I still did the performance arts with Homa and her and the cast, but I never followed up media until, until I was like 35 years old" | Shows the detour into physics and away from media. |
| 5 | Healthcare years photo | "It was very rewarding, but it was, uh, it paid pennies" | Documents the heart-driven but financially difficult years. |
| 6 | Consulting era photo | "I worked in management consulting, uh, from 2014 to 2019" | The financially successful but spiritually empty period. |
| **FAMILY** | | | |
| 7 | Uncle photo | "my uncle was protesting the regime. He was standing out and it ended up, uh, being his demise 'cause he was executed by the regime in 1988" | Honours his memory and the cost of standing out. |
| 8 | Family escape photo | "we were in the middle of the night, we were camped out at some desert place in, uh, in Iran, close to the Pakistan border" | The night that changed everything. |
| **IMPACT** | | | |
| 9 | Wonder launch photo | "I'm just gonna start doing it" | The moment you stopped waiting for permission. |
| 10 | Protest photo | "I had a lot of rage, anger that was unaddressed from all the years" | Shows you channeling generational trauma into action. |
| 11 | Press credential photo | "I'm kneeling the dairy. I'm a woman in power because I don't need permission" | Full circle — from hiding to being credentialed press. |

---

## SECTION: VIDEO SHOT DETAILS — THE WHY BEHIND EACH SHOT

**Story Shots (12–19) | These appear at specific moments in your episode**

| **Shot · Duration** | **Before (from episode)** | **Mood** |
|---|---|---|
| **Shot 12 · Morning Light** *20–30 sec* | "Well, what inspires me about Wonder is Wonder is an assignment" | Quiet reverence — someone receiving their daily mission. |
| **Shot 13 · Storytelling Mode** *30–45 sec* | "I call it a ministry because some of these stories, it's very clear that there is a higher power involved" | Focused intensity — channeling something bigger than yourself. |
| **Shot 14 · Prayer Moment** *15–20 sec* | "one night I was like three in the morning and I wake up and, and God's like, you gotta let this go" | Vulnerable surrender — the posture of listening. |
| **Shot 15 · Creative Process** *20–30 sec* | "I see this girl who's just like, so bold and, and not afraid" | Inspired action — turning revelation into creation. |
| **Shot 16 · Persian Heritage** *15–20 sec* | "I was born in Iran 1982, a couple years after the revolution" | Cultural grounding — the heritage you carry forward. |
| **Shot 17 · Mission Work** *20–30 sec* | "I had, um, one gentleman who watched one of my, one of my wonder stories, and he hadn't talked to his father in a long time" | Tangible impact — seeds being planted in others. |
| **Shot 18 · Wonder Recording** *30–45 sec* | "So why can't I start Wonder in my apartment in Boise?" | Raw determination — creating with whatever you have. |
| **Shot 19 · Reflection Walk** *20–30 sec* | "I think I hid for a long time and living there, I was still kind of hiding when I was living there, but, uh, it showed me what not hiding looked like" | Contemplative freedom — no longer hiding. |

---

## SECTION: VIDEOGRAPHER TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

| **Format & Resolution** | **Lighting** |
|---|---|
| 4K preferred · 2K or 1080p minimum | Golden hour: 1 hour after sunrise or before sunset |
| Landscape/horizontal only | Overcast days: soft, flattering, no harsh shadows |
| NO vertical video under any circumstances | Indoors: subject near window, natural light as key |

| **Shot Composition** | **What to Avoid** |
|---|---|
| Use tripod or gimbal for stability | No shaky handheld unless intentionally stylistic |
| Frame using the rule of thirds | No cluttered or distracting backgrounds |
| If you move the camera, move with intention | No filming in harsh midday sun |
| Each clip: 10–60 seconds. No shorter, no longer | No unlabelled clips — unlabelled content will not be used |

---

## SECTION: CLOSING

*NILU, you've shared an incredible story of planting seeds that wait decades to bloom.* The materials you submit now will help us show viewers not just what you've overcome, but who you've become. **— The Inside Success TV Production Team**
